converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Corporate and Foundation Relations records
Cornell University. University Development. Corporate and Foundation Relations
4-3-2538
8 cubic feet. 8 cubic feet.
1968-1986. Correspondence, corporate records. Correspondence and other documents relating to Cornell's interaction with corporations and foundations outside the University. Collection material in English 2093016
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, April 2004
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence and other documents relating to Cornell's interaction with corporations and foundations outside the University.
Cite As:
Cornell University Corporate and Foundation Relations records, #4-3-2538. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:
Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.
Cornell University -- : Public relations.
